message:
Welcome to Too Good To Be True, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
*Incident Number INC100052:* P2 test
Welcome our new IM @andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com, Happy to have you in the team. Hope you get comfortable with everyone
Welcome @andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com
Nice to meet you @andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com
There are a few strange customer reports with the helpdesk
Apparently, the site is loading slowly
People are reporting that they can't make payments either
@andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com Can you check this?
ok will check now
:star: Reproduces the incident
so i am seeing a message stating that there is a bad gateway 502 error @bob
Same here - Let me know if you need more information - Also, the customer calls are increasing
ok i will start an incident for this
Thanks
*Incident Number INC100059:* P1 website is down
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
How many customers are affected? Are the reports coming in from all regions?
do we know haow many customers this affecting and is it all regions?@bob
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Let me gather the information for you
There are more than 300 customer reports till now
thank you
Calls are from every region, likely to be Global
There's a bunch of messages coming in. A few people saying they can't do anything on the site
Let me know if you need more information
:bulb: Form a working theory and try to validate or invalidate it
so we have reports of over 300 uses and all regions @bez
:star: Qualify the problem
Okay , Thanks- Get this sorted ASAP - Its an important day for us
So i have tried to visit the site and am able to reproduce the issue the customer is experiencing with being unable to access the site
:bulb: Form an effective investigation team
Same here - Website seems to completely down
Can we get @tanya to have a look and see if they can see anything from there end?

Sure, i will take a look at this .
Everything from platform looks fine - But there seems to be few errors from Front end
Worth checking with Shsay or Daniel
Infrastructure looks healthy- No CPU or disk space errors
ok thanks can you have a look @daniel to see if you can see anything from your end please
:bulb: Check the changes done in the platform
Looking into this and trying to replicate the issue
I am able to replicate the issue. Checking the logs now
I see a lot of errors, most of them are context initialisation errors
Yes replicated the issue and even i'm seeing similar errors in frontend logs
HI Andrew- Whats the latest ?
I have a stake holders meet in next 10 minutes, @andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com do you think this can be resolved by then?
Is there an ETA for resolution m, DO you have the necessary team to resolve?
the team are investigating this at the moment, as soon as i have an update i will let you know
:bulb: You have support from other more experienced colleagues when needed
do we think it was change made today that has caused the issue?
I have verified Payments change (CHG89347), there are no errors and the service is up and healthy
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Checkout service change(CHG89350) is in UAT, so not affecting PROD. But I see a few errors from Frontend pods
All the errors started right after the change (CHG89349) on the Frontend
The customer complaints are rising. @andrew.carter-withersworldwide.com Do we have an ETA for resolution?
What is the latest on this?
at the moment the team are still investigating the issue so not at the moment
@hamed are you able to see anything on your end?
The errors started after Front end deployment - We should revert the change - I see start up errors in Front end pods
I did follow the chat, I could see the issue started exactly at the time when the change was implemented on the frontend
Did we test the change in the UAT environment before implementation
The team are still investigating
A Frontend change caused by change CHG89349 has brought down the Frontend pods
But this functionally worked when I tested
Even if it worked in your test environment, something's behaving differently in prod, maybe a config mismatch or unhandled edge case
Can you give a quick update on the status?
are we able to reverse the change to get the site back up and running
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Sorry, I've never done a rollback in PROD before, can someone help me with the steps?
I will help you, @Shay. Rolling back now
@daniel are you able to help shay with this?
I have rollbacked Frontend:version to 10.1.0 to more stable version. Can somebody verify?

To verify resolution and close incident:
--Validate fix with team:white_check_mark:
--Check with Customer Support:white_check_mark:
--Confirm in 'Business-comms':white_check_mark:
Customers are able to place the orders, complaint calls have reduced as well.
They are looking at rolling back a change that was made this morning that they think has caused the issue
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
I have logged in to the site and was able to place an order it looks like it is now back up and running
Yes, I see the apps are giving 200's now
:star: Validate the fix
Have we recovered
@Andrew
We can alos see orders are being place and users and user activity on the website
Yes, the client calls have reduced
We are starting the orders place and user activity on the website
Great work- Thanks much quick turn around
It's definitely working again!
Wow that was intense!
Thanks! for resolving it quickly
Good job guys
Yes well done! that could have gone much worse so props to everyone
We will have a Post-Incident Review (PIR) to understand what happened

Drill Wrap-Up

Thanks for playing! This session is now closed.

Please return to your Uptime Labs tab to review your performance and complete the Retrospective & Feedback form.

If you've already closed the tab, you can reopen the form using the button below.

Thanks for playing! Please complete your feedback here:
